productDisplayName: Crusoe Men Sport Dark Grey Shorts
description: Composition Dark grey shorts made of blended fabric, has pockets on the sides, drawcord elastic waist, branding left pocket and contrast panel design above the hem Fit Comfort Wash care Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Use mild detergent only Do not iron motif/print/trims/logo These shorts from crusoe wick sweat away from your skin, allowing your skin to breathe comfortably while you run or workout, letting you focus on getting beyond that extra mile or lap. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, the fabric contours your skin neatly to allow free and flexible movement. Pair it with a T-shirt and achieve maximum performance.
